overview: Based on the published agenda, the Utility Committee of the Village of Kronenwetter was scheduled to meet on June 2, 2026, to address approval of previous meeting minutes, receive a Director of Public Works and Utilities report, and consider new business items including requests for proposals for a new garage and discussion of village property near Lea Road.

agenda.item: Approval of Minutes from May 5, 2026 Utility Committee Meeting
Director of Public Works and Utilities Report

discussions.item: Approval of Minutes from May 5, 2026 Utility Committee Meeting
discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to review and take possible action on approval of the minutes from the previous Utility Committee meeting held on May 5, 2026.

discussions.item: Director of Public Works and Utilities Report
discussions.body: The committee was set to receive a report from the Director of Public Works and Utilities covering matters related to village utilities and public works operations.
The committee was scheduled to discuss and take possible action on requests for proposals related to a new garage project for the village.
The committee was scheduled to discuss and take possible action regarding village property located by Lea Road.

publicComment: Public comment was scheduled on the agenda, with a maximum of 15 minutes total and a three-minute time period per person, subject to extension at the Chief Presiding Officer's discretion.
actionItems: Expected to vote on approval of May 5, 2026 Utility Committee meeting minutes
Scheduled to consider action on New Garage RFPs
Scheduled to consider action on Village Property by Lea Road
title: Utility Committee Meeting - 2026-06-02
